name: Validate & Decode (base64)
Set Save Path
Build analyze.py cmd
Compose Influx Point
Alert > Telegram
HTTP OK
Parse CAPTURE
Set analyze args
Capture ENV (cache)
Rename by Tray
Set limit & forward
List Media (FS → JSON)

append: -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$base='C:\AppServ\www\minijec\media'; $root='C:\AppServ\www'; $items = Get-ChildItem -Path $base -Recurse -Include *.jpg,*.jpeg,*.png -File | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending; $out = foreach($i in $items){ $full=$i.FullName; $rel=$full.Substring($base.Length).TrimStart('\'); $url='/minijec/media/' + $rel.Replace('\\','/'); [PSCustomObject]@{ path=$full; url=$url; filename=$i.Name; size=$i.Length; modified=$i.LastWriteTimeUtc.ToString('o') } }; $out | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

name: List Media (PS → JSON)
Find by id → detail
Build Flux (avg/cell)
func:
msg.query = `
import "date"
start = date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1d)
from(bucket: "Datafarm")
  |> range(start: start)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "growth" and r._field == "seed_count")
  |> group(columns: ["plant_id","tray_id","cell_id"])
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
`;
return msg;
